sql_array: CREATE TABLE visits (id UInt32, url String, duration Float32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id SAMPLE BY id;
INSERT INTO visits (id, url, duration) VALUES (1, 'http://example.com', 3.5), (2, 'http://example.org', 4.0), (3, 'http://example.net', 2.5);
SELECT COUNT(*) * _sample_factor AS approximate_count FROM visits SAMPLE 0.1;
SELECT AVG(duration) AS average_duration FROM visits SAMPLE 0.5;
UPDATE visits SET duration = duration + 1 WHERE id = 1 SAMPLE 0.1;
